issues.description: Condition should check for face-up Life cards, not just any Life card on board. 'HasCardOnBoard' does not specify face-up status.
Second action should flip Life cards face-down, not remove them. 'RemoveLife' is incorrect; should use a flip/face-down action or custom action type.
KO action targets 'up to 1' opponent Character, but target definition lacks explicit 'maxCount' or 'optional' flag to indicate 'up to' semantics.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] If you have a face-up Life card, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less. Then, turn all of your Life cards face-down.
